title: 3 Reasons You Keep Failing Funded Challenges (ICT Trader Mistakes)
description: If you keep blowing funded accounts, this is exactly why. These 3 ICT trading mistakes are killing your challenges before they even start. Fix these and watch everything change. Follow R2F Trading for daily smart money concepts, order blocks, and fair value gap setups that actually work.
script: If you've blown a funded account, it wasn't bad luck. It was one of these three mistakes. And 9 out of 10 ICT traders make all three. Mistake one. Trading every fair value gap you see. Not every FVG is a setup. If there's no liquidity above or below — you're just gambling. Mistake two. Ignoring the killzone. Most traders enter whenever. Smart money moves at specific times. Outside those windows — the market will eat you. Mistake three. This one hurts. Risking too much to recover losses. One bad trade turns into three. Your funded account is gone before lunch. Protect the drawdown first. Always. Fix these three. Pass your challenge. Build your account. Follow R2F Trading — new ICT setups every single day.
